climate.description: Mediterranean spring: mild, sunny days perfect for cycling through vineyards.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 71. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 67.

course_description.character: Hilly road loop through Douro Valley's terraced vineyards, blending relentless climbs with sweeping descents and river views.
course_description.signature_challenge: The return via Muro do Cadão, a 3.1km beast at 10.2% that breaks the field in spectacular wine country.
suffering_zones: Muro do Cadão: 3.1 km at 10.2% gradient; brutal late-race wall testing legs after earlier efforts.
Favaios Climb: Steep ascent through historic village, iconic queen stage highlight amid wine terraces.
Tabuaço Ascent: Grueling haul with panoramic Douro vistas, penultimate challenge before descent.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Quinta do Vallado wine hotel 2km from start in Peso da Régua; abundant options in Porto and Douro Valley.
logistics.transport: Well-supported event with bib pickup day prior, ample aid stations, mechanical support, and finisher amenities. Easy access from Porto.

history.origin_story: Portugal's largest gran fondo, evolved from Douro origins to showcase the iconic wine valley with massive international fields.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic Douro masterpiece blending savage climbs with wine country bliss.

citations.label: Love Tiles Douro Granfondo, 26 Apr 2026 | World's Marathons
